seoTitle: Hanwood vs Hardys Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hanwood and Hardys Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hanwood vs Hardys Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hanwood and Hardys Bay.
heading: Hanwood vs Hardys Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hanwood, New South Wales and Hardys Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hardys Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Hanwood (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hanwood or Hardys Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hanwood has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Hardys Bay scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hanwood scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Hardys Bay scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hanwood or Hardys Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hardys Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
